title: Change of release date for Evangelion 20 222 UK
display_title: Change of release date for Evangelion 20 222 UK
wikitext:
[]: Change of release date for Evangelion 2.0/2.22 UK             Quote Post by EvaPilot10 » Sat May 14, 2011 10:46 am Release date has been changed from 30th May to 20th June. Anyone know why the release date has been changed?

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Sat May 14, 2011 1:37 pm Lets hope its so Manga can author the DVD's a bit better this time, could only watch 1.11 on DVD after copying it, slightly taboo subject I know but having bought it on DVD & Blu-ray locally (not to mention the several imported ones from Japan & HK) I feel it fell under fair use as it was the only way I could watch it. The Blu-ray had no problems though but that player aint hooked up to the sound system.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaPilot10 » Sat May 14, 2011 1:46 pm Hawq wrote: Lets hope its so Manga can author the DVD's a bit better this time, could only watch 1.11 on DVD after copying it...

[]:             Quote Post by insomniac » Sun May 15, 2011 5:02 am 20th June is when the Australian are getting it, and we're in the same region as the UK. Perhaps to prevent us importing it or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Sun May 15, 2011 10:58 am EvaPilot10 wrote: That's odd. Mine worked fine on my computer. Maybe you got a dud?

[]:             Quote Post by Wadels » Tue May 17, 2011 3:39 am insomniac wrote: 20th June is when the Australian are getting it, and we're in the same region as the UK. Perhaps to prevent us importing it or something.

[]:             Quote Post by insomniac » Fri May 20, 2011 11:46 pm Hawq wrote: Australia is R4 so that's probably not it, though I guess using the same TV system I can see where you're coming from

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Sat May 21, 2011 12:00 pm ah thought you were talking dvd regions, minor brain fade on my part forgetting the bd ones are the same
